regulations.title: Portuguese Carbon Tax on Industrial Emissions
regulations.summary: FY2025 declaration submitted 27 February: 1,748 tCO2e = EUR 75,100; payment due 31 March 2026.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Draft delegated act confirmed Class C cartons; SIG Combibloc combidome® EUR 280k proposal to achieve Class B by 2027; board decision April 2026.

regulations.title: Portuguese Deposit-Return Scheme
regulations.summary: 10,000 glass bottle units allocated; pilot logistics team briefed; Q2 2026 launch on track.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Citrus Brasil declaration received; Ingredion Brazil pending; Kenyan passion fruit origin confirmed non-deforestation.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
regulations.summary: ABIO guidance: organic cert covers environment not labour; 34 farm contracts require ILO 184 clauses at renewal.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: DMA complete (BDO signed 28 Feb): E1, E3, E4, S2, G1 material; ESRS disclosure drafting initiated.
